en.tldr: Identifies a Selection Plateau in one-shot pruning and proposes the Sparsity-Information-Complexity Spectrum hypothesis, suggesting feature complexity must adapt to target sparsity.
en.motivation: To explain performance clustering of diverse pruning methods and guide future algorithm design.
en.method: Tests nine feature classes on ViT-Small/CIFAR-10 across four sparsities, analyzing feature complexity's role in escaping the plateau.

idea_spark.inspiration: Extracting non-monotonicity from chaotic features may inspire novel pruning feature designs.

papers.title: Bootstrap-Based Receiver Synchronization and System Discovery in B2X: An Extension of ATSC 3.0
papers.summary: Addressing the increasing and diversified demands of multicast and broadcast services require highly efficient multicast and broadcast technologies. Broadcast networks, such as Advanced Television Systems Committee 3.0 (ATSC 3.0), are inherently designed to support these services and continue to evolve to meet growing performance and scalability requirements. At the same time, smartphones are increasingly used for video streaming and other high-volume services, placing growing pressure on mobile network capacity. Interworking between broadcast and mobile networks is therefore an important enabler for efficient and seamless service delivery. In this context, Broadcast-to-Everything (B2X) extends ATSC 3.0 to support enhanced interoperability with Third Generation Partnership Project (3GPP) mobile systems while maintaining low cross-correlation with ATSC 3.0 bootstrap signals, supporting reliable system identification in scenarios where multiple waveforms may be present. Bootstrap signaling, which enables initial signal detection and synchronization, is a key feature of ATSC-based waveform discovery and synchronization, and B2X further extends this capability through a scalable bootstrap framework supporting a range of bandwidth configurations. This paper investigates system discovery through bootstrap signal detection at the B2X receiver and presents key design-related findings, including parameter selection and cross-testing with ATSC 3.0. We present extensive simulations of the receiver performance under diverse propagation and mobility conditions, ranging from stationary to high-speed scenarios. The results demonstrate the robustness of the B2X bootstrap signaling design across a broad range of channel conditions relevant to multicast and broadcast operation.

ai.tldr: 本文提出B2X扩展ATSC 3.0，通过可扩展的引导信号框架支持多带宽配置，实现与3GPP移动系统的互操作，并在多种传播和移动条件下验证了接收机同步与系统发现的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 应对多播和广播服务日益增长且多样化的需求，以及智能手机视频流对移动网络容量的压力，需要广播与移动网络的高效互通。
ai.method: 基于ATSC 3.0引导信号，设计B2X可扩展引导框架，通过参数选择和交叉测试，在多种信道条件下仿真评估接收机性能。
ai.result: 仿真结果表明B2X引导信号设计在从静止到高速的广泛信道条件下均具有鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解广播与移动网络互操作中引导信号同步与系统发现的设计要点和性能评估方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用可扩展引导信号实现多波形共存环境下的可靠系统识别。
idea_spark.risk: 实际部署中需考虑硬件实现复杂度和多标准兼容性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可借鉴B2X的引导信号设计思路，用于6G中广播与蜂窝网络的深度融合。

en.tldr: This paper proposes B2X as an extension of ATSC 3.0, using a scalable bootstrap framework to support multiple bandwidth configurations and enable interoperability with 3GPP mobile systems, and validates the robustness of receiver synchronization and system discovery under diverse propagation and mobility conditions.
en.motivation: Addressing the increasing and diversified demands of multicast and broadcast services and the pressure on mobile network capacity from smartphone video streaming requires efficient interworking between broadcast and mobile networks.
en.method: Based on ATSC 3.0 bootstrap signaling, design a scalable B2X bootstrap framework, perform parameter selection and cross-testing, and evaluate receiver performance through extensive simulations under various channel conditions.
en.result: Simulation results demonstrate the robustness of the B2X bootstrap signaling design across a wide range of channel conditions from stationary to high-speed scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the design considerations and performance evaluation methods for bootstrap-based synchronization and system discovery in broadcast-mobile interworking.

idea_spark.idea: Use scalable bootstrap signaling to achieve reliable system identification in environments with multiple coexisting waveforms.
idea_spark.risk: Practical deployment may face challenges in hardware implementation complexity and multi-standard compatibility.
idea_spark.inspiration: The B2X bootstrap design approach can inspire deep integration of broadcast and cellular networks in 6G.

papers.title: Tokens-per-Parameter Coverage Is Critical for Robust LLM Scaling Law Extrapolation
papers.summary: Neural scaling laws approximate a language model's loss as a power-law function of parameter count $N$ and token count $D$. Following Chinchilla-style compute-optimal training, many studies fit scaling laws from runs performed under a fixed tokens-per-parameter (TPP) ratio $k$ and set $D = kN$. We show that this collinear design, combined with the empirically common near-equality of the exponents governing $N$ and $D$, induces an inherent ill-conditioning in the Gauss-Newton least-squares problem: the condition number of the design grows as the inverse square of the gap between the $N$ and $D$-exponents. The scale coefficients become practically unidentifiable, with confidence intervals inflating by an order of magnitude or more, yielding a ``sloppy'' model whose extrapolations degrade sharply off the training ray. We prove this for four scaling-law formalisms and derive a closed-form TPP-diversity threshold that is necessary and sufficient for well-conditioned estimation. Empirically, non-collinear designs outperform collinear ones on held-out splits with a 97.3\% win rate across four laws, five corpora, multiple floating point precision modes. We further show the degeneracy is rooted in Jacobian geometry and is not an artifact of the loss function: any smooth estimation objective whose curvature involves the Jacobian inherits the same ill-conditioning.

ai.tldr: 本文证明，在固定tokens-per-parameter（TPP）比率的共线设计下，神经缩放律的参数估计存在严重病态，导致外推性能急剧下降。
ai.motivation: 现有缩放律研究常采用固定TPP比率的共线设计，但该设计在参数和token指数接近时会导致参数不可识别，影响外推可靠性。
ai.method: 通过理论分析四种缩放律形式，推导出TPP多样性阈值，并采用非共线设计进行实验验证。
ai.result: 非共线设计在四个定律、五个语料库和多种精度模式下以97.3%的胜率优于共线设计，且病态源于雅可比几何而非损失函数。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解缩放律外推的局限性，并提供设计实验时避免共线性的指导。

zh.tldr: 本文证明，在固定tokens-per-parameter（TPP）比率的共线设计下，神经缩放律的参数估计存在严重病态，导致外推性能急剧下降。
zh.motivation: 现有缩放律研究常采用固定TPP比率的共线设计，但该设计在参数和token指数接近时会导致参数不可识别，影响外推可靠性。
zh.method: 通过理论分析四种缩放律形式，推导出TPP多样性阈值，并采用非共线设计进行实验验证。
zh.result: 非共线设计在四个定律、五个语料库和多种精度模式下以97.3%的胜率优于共线设计，且病态源于雅可比几何而非损失函数。

en.tldr: This paper proves that collinear designs with fixed tokens-per-parameter (TPP) ratios cause severe ill-conditioning in scaling law parameter estimation, leading to degraded extrapolation performance.
en.motivation: Existing scaling law studies often use collinear designs with fixed TPP ratios, but this design makes parameters unidentifiable when N and D exponents are close, compromising extrapolation reliability.
en.method: Theoretical analysis of four scaling law formalisms derives a TPP-diversity threshold, and non-collinear designs are empirically validated.
en.result: Non-collinear designs outperform collinear ones with a 97.3% win rate across four laws, five corpora, and multiple precision modes; the degeneracy stems from Jacobian geometry, not the loss function.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand limitations of scaling law extrapolation and provides guidance to avoid collinearity in experimental design.

idea_spark.idea: Use the TPP-diversity threshold to design adaptive sampling strategies that dynamically adjust TPP ratios during training to improve parameter identifiability.
idea_spark.risk: Non-collinear designs may increase computational cost, and threshold selection requires tuning for specific models and datasets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reexamining model fitting ill-conditioning from a Jacobian geometry perspective inspires development of more robust optimization objectives or regularization methods.

papers.title: Edge-averaging dynamics on finite graphs: moment dependence
papers.summary: We study the edge-averaging process on a finite, connected graph $G = (V, E)$. Initially, the vertices in $V$ are endowed with i.i.d.\ real-valued opinions $(f_0(v))_{v \in V}$. Edges are activated according to i.i.d.\ Poisson clocks of rate $1$; when an edge is activated, the opinions at its endpoints are replaced by their average. Let $f_t(v)$ denote the opinion at $v$ at time $t$.Define the $ε$-convergence time $τ_ε$ as the first time when the maximum and the minimum of $f_t$ differ by at most $ε$. It is known that if the initial opinions $(f_0(v))_{v \in V}$ are bounded in $L^\infty$, then $\mathbb{E}(τ_ε)$ is at most $C_ε\log^2 n$ for $ε\in (0, 1]$. We assume instead that the $L^p$ norm of $f_0(v)$ is at most $1$ for every $v \in V$. For fixed $ε\in (0, 1]$, and show that $\mathbb{E}(τ_ε) = \widetilde{O}(n^{β_p})$ up to logarithmic terms, where $β_p := \max(3 - p, 2/p)$. Moreover, this power law is tight on cycle graphs.

ai.tldr: 研究了有限连通图上的边平均过程，在初始意见仅具有有界L^p范数时，给出了ε-收敛时间的期望上界，并证明该上界在圈图上是最优的。
ai.motivation: 已有结果假设初始意见有界，本文放宽条件至L^p范数有界，探究矩条件对收敛时间的影响。
ai.method: 利用泊松时钟激活边并取平均，分析最大最小意见差首次小于ε的时刻，通过矩估计和图论推导上界。
ai.result: 期望收敛时间至多为Õ(n^{β_p})，其中β_p = max(3-p, 2/p)，且在圈图上达到该幂律下界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机平均过程中初始矩条件如何影响收敛速度，为设计高效分布式算法提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑非均匀激活率或加权平均，探索更一般的矩依赖收敛界。
idea_spark.risk: 幂律上界可能依赖于图的结构特性，推广到一般图时需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用矩方法分析随机过程收敛性，启发在复杂网络上研究类似问题。

en.tldr: We study the edge-averaging process on finite connected graphs. Under the assumption that initial opinions have bounded L^p norm, we derive an upper bound for the expected ε-convergence time and show it is tight on cycles.
en.motivation: Previous results required bounded L^∞ initial opinions; we relax to L^p boundedness to understand the role of moment conditions.
en.method: Edges are activated by Poisson clocks; opinions are averaged. We analyze the first time the max-min difference falls below ε using moment estimates and graph-theoretic arguments.
en.result: The expected convergence time is at most Õ(n^{β_p}) with β_p = max(3-p, 2/p), and this power law is optimal on cycle graphs.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into how initial moment conditions affect convergence speed in averaging dynamics, aiding the design of efficient distributed algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Investigate non-uniform activation rates or weighted averages to derive more general moment-dependent convergence bounds.
idea_spark.risk: The power-law bound may depend on graph structure; generalization to arbitrary graphs requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using moment methods to analyze stochastic process convergence inspires similar studies on complex networks.

papers.title: Augmented Equivariant Mesh Networks for Anatomical Segmentation
papers.summary: Anatomical mesh segmentation requires models that operate directly on irregular surface geometry while remaining robust to arbitrary patient pose and mesh resolution variation. Existing task-specific mesh and point-cloud methods are not equivariant, and can degrade sharply under test-time perturbation, for example dropping by 25-26 IoU points on intraoral scan segmentation at $40^\circ$ tilt. We present EAMS, an Equivariant Anatomical Mesh Segmentor built on Equivariant Mesh Neural Networks (EMNN), and evaluate it across four clinically distinct tasks spanning edge-, vertex-, and face-level supervision. We combine intrinsic mesh descriptors with anatomy-aware priors, including PCA-derived frames for dental arches and liver surfaces, and augment message passing to provide lightweight global context. Across intracranial aneurysm and intraoral segmentation, EAMS variants are competitive with specialized baselines on unperturbed inputs while remaining stable under geometric perturbations, and on liver surfaces they expose a favorable trade-off between canonical-pose accuracy and rotation robustness. These results show that a lightweight ($<2$M parameters) equivariant framework can deliver robust anatomical mesh segmentation across diverse supervision types without task-specific architectures.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级等变网格网络EAMS，在解剖分割中同时保持对姿态和网格分辨率变化的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有网格和点云方法缺乏等变性，在测试时受扰动（如倾斜40°）性能急剧下降（IoU下降25-26点）。
ai.method: 基于等变网格神经网络，结合内在网格描述子和解剖先验（如PCA坐标系），并增强消息传递以提供轻量全局上下文。
ai.result: 在颅内动脉瘤、口内扫描和肝脏表面等四个临床任务上，EAMS在无扰动输入下与专用基线相当，在几何扰动下保持稳定，且参数量小于2M。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需任务特定架构即可实现鲁棒解剖网格分割的通用框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用PCA从解剖结构（如牙弓、肝脏表面）提取固有坐标系，增强等变网络的先验信息。
idea_spark.risk: PCA坐标系可能对异常解剖结构敏感，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将几何先验（如主曲率方向）融入等变网络的消息传递机制，提升对旋转和姿态的鲁棒性。

en.tldr: We propose EAMS, a lightweight equivariant mesh network that achieves robust anatomical segmentation under geometric perturbations across diverse supervision types.
en.motivation: Existing mesh and point-cloud methods lack equivariance, degrading sharply (e.g., 25-26 IoU drop) under test-time perturbations like 40° tilt.
en.method: Built on Equivariant Mesh Neural Networks, combining intrinsic mesh descriptors with anatomy-aware priors (e.g., PCA-derived frames) and augmented message passing for lightweight global context.
en.result: On four clinical tasks (intracranial aneurysm, intraoral scan, liver surfaces), EAMS matches specialized baselines on unperturbed inputs and remains stable under perturbations, with <2M parameters.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general-purpose equivariant framework for robust anatomical mesh segmentation without task-specific architectures.

idea_spark.idea: Use PCA to extract intrinsic coordinate frames from anatomical structures (e.g., dental arches, liver surfaces) to enhance equivariant network priors.
idea_spark.risk: PCA frames may be sensitive to abnormal anatomy, requiring validation of generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrate geometric priors (e.g., principal curvature directions) into message passing of equivariant networks to improve robustness to rotation and pose.

papers.title: INFANiTE: Implicit Neural representation for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI
papers.summary: Spatio-temporal fetal brain atlases are important for characterizing normative neurodevelopment and identifying congenital anomalies. However, existing atlas construction pipelines necessitate days for slice-to-volume reconstruction (SVR) to generate high-resolution 3D brain volumes and several additional days for iterative volume registration, thereby rendering atlas construction from large-scale cohorts prohibitively impractical. We address these limitations with INFANiTE, an Implicit Neural Representation (INR) framework for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI scans, bypassing both the costly SVR and the iterative non-rigid registration steps entirely, thereby substantially accelerating atlas construction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that INFANiTE outperforms existing baselines in subject consistency, reference fidelity, intrinsic quality and biological plausibility, even under challenging sparse-data settings. Additionally, INFANiTE reduces the end-to-end processing time (i.e., from raw scans to the final atlas) from days to hours compared to the traditional 3D volume-based pipeline (e.g., SyGN), facilitating large-scale population-level fetal brain analysis. Our code is publicly available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/INFANiTE-5D74

ai.tldr: 提出INFANiTE框架，利用隐式神经表示从临床厚层MRI直接学习高分辨率胎儿脑时空图谱，跳过传统切片到体积重建和迭代配准步骤，将处理时间从数天缩短至数小时。
ai.motivation: 现有胎儿脑图谱构建依赖耗时的切片到体积重建和迭代配准，难以应用于大规模队列。
ai.method: 采用隐式神经表示（INR）直接从厚层MRI扫描学习高分辨率时空图谱，无需显式重建和配准。
ai.result: 在主体一致性、参考保真度、内在质量和生物合理性上优于基线，且端到端时间从数天降至数小时。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员快速构建大规模胎儿脑图谱，支持神经发育研究和先天性异常检测。

idea_spark.idea: 将INR与自监督学习结合，进一步减少对标注数据的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 在极端稀疏或噪声数据下，INR可能难以保持解剖细节。
idea_spark.inspiration: 跳过传统重建和配准步骤的思路，可启发其他医学图像分析流程的简化。

en.tldr: Proposes INFANiTE, an implicit neural representation framework that learns high-resolution fetal brain spatio-temporal atlases directly from clinical thick-slice MRI, bypassing slice-to-volume reconstruction and iterative registration, reducing processing time from days to hours.
en.motivation: Existing fetal brain atlas construction pipelines require days for slice-to-volume reconstruction and iterative registration, making large-scale cohort analysis impractical.
en.method: Uses implicit neural representation (INR) to learn high-resolution spatio-temporal atlases directly from thick-slice MRI scans, eliminating explicit reconstruction and registration steps.
en.result: Outperforms baselines in subject consistency, reference fidelity, intrinsic quality, and biological plausibility, while reducing end-to-end time from days to hours.
en.help_to_user: Enables rapid construction of large-scale fetal brain atlases for neurodevelopment research and congenital anomaly detection.

idea_spark.idea: Combine INR with self-supervised learning to further reduce reliance on labeled data.
idea_spark.risk: Under extreme sparse or noisy data, INR may struggle to preserve fine anatomical details.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach of bypassing traditional reconstruction and registration steps can inspire simplification of other medical image analysis pipelines.

papers.title: Causal Explanations from the Geometric Properties of ReLU Neural Networks
papers.summary: Neural networks have proved an effective means of learning control policies for autonomous systems, but these learned policies are difficult to understand due to the black-box nature of neural networks. This lack of interpretability makes safety assurance for such autonomous systems challenging. The fields of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) and eXplainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) aim to interpret the decision making processes of neural networks and autonomous agents, respectively. In particular, work on causal explanations aims to provide "why" and "why not" explanations for why a model made a given decision. However, most of the work on explainability to date utilises a distilled version of the original model. While this distilled policy is interpretable, it necessarily degrades in performance significantly when compared to the original model, and is not guaranteed to be an accurate reflection of the decision making processes in the original model and as such cannot be used to guarantee its safety. Recent work on understanding the geometry of ReLU neural networks shows that a ReLU network corresponds to a piecewise linear function divided into regions defined by an n-dimensional convex polytope. Through this lens, a neural network can be understood as dividing the input space into distinct regions which apply a single linear function for each output neuron. We show that this geometric representation can be used to generate causal explanations for the network's behaviour similar to previous work, but which extracts rules directly from the geometry of Neural Networks with the ReLU activation function, and is therefore an accurate reflection of the network's behaviour.

ai.tldr: 利用ReLU神经网络的几何性质（分段线性函数和凸多面体区域划分）直接提取因果解释，避免蒸馏模型带来的性能损失和解释失真。
ai.motivation: 现有因果解释方法依赖蒸馏模型，导致性能下降且无法准确反映原网络决策过程，难以用于安全保证。
ai.method: 将ReLU网络视为将输入空间划分为多个凸多面体区域，每个区域对应一个线性函数，直接从这些几何结构中提取因果规则。
ai.result: 该方法能生成与先前工作类似的因果解释，但规则直接源自网络几何，因此更准确地反映网络行为。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解ReLU神经网络决策的因果逻辑，提升自主系统安全可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将因果解释与网络几何结构绑定，可进一步用于在线监控或反事实推理。
idea_spark.risk: 高维空间中的凸多面体数量可能指数增长，导致规则提取计算开销大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受ReLU网络几何理解启发，将解释问题转化为几何区域分析。

idea_spark.risk: 高维空间中的凸多面体数量可能指数增长，导致规则提取计算开销大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受ReLU网络几何理解启发，将解释问题转化为几何区域分析。

en.tldr: Leveraging the geometric properties of ReLU neural networks (piecewise linear functions and convex polytope partitions) to directly extract causal explanations, avoiding performance loss and interpretation distortion from distilled models.
en.motivation: Existing causal explanation methods rely on distilled models, leading to performance degradation and inaccurate reflection of the original network's decision process, making safety assurance difficult.
en.method: Viewing a ReLU network as partitioning the input space into convex polytopes, each applying a single linear function, and extracting causal rules directly from these geometric structures.
en.result: The method generates causal explanations similar to prior work, but the rules are directly derived from the network's geometry, thus more accurately reflecting its behavior.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the causal logic behind ReLU neural network decisions, enhancing interpretability and safety of autonomous systems.

idea_spark.idea: Binding causal explanations to network geometry could enable online monitoring or counterfactual reasoning.
idea_spark.risk: The number of convex polytopes in high-dimensional spaces may grow exponentially, leading to high computational cost for rule extraction.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the geometric understanding of ReLU networks, reframing explanation as geometric region analysis.

papers.title: Barrier Certificates for Uncertain Temporal Specifications
papers.summary: This paper studies satisfying temporal logic specifications on stochastic dynamical systems, where the predicates evolve randomly over time. Such randomness may arise from uncertain environment models or external stochastic processes causing the sets associated with predicate satisfaction to vary in a non-deterministic manner. As a result, verifying whether a stochastic dynamical system satisfies a temporal specification depends also on the uncertainty in the predicates. We develop a certificate-based framework to bound the probability of satisfying temporal logic specifications with randomly evolving predicates. We first show that temporal logic specifications with stochastic predicates can be transformed to specifications with deterministic predicates on an augmented space which is extended to include the stochastic space of predicate's uncertainty. We then utilize barrier certificates on an augmented space to provide tractable optimization-based conditions and to avoid the computational burden of dynamic programming. Focusing on linear dynamics and safety-type specifications, we derive analytical conditions under which barrier certificates guarantee bounds on the probability of violating the stochastic safety predicates. The approach is demonstrated on numerical case studies.

ai.tldr: 针对具有随机演化谓词的不确定时间逻辑规范，提出基于障碍证书的框架来界定满足概率。
ai.motivation: 现有验证方法假设谓词确定，但实际环境中谓词可能随机变化，导致规范满足概率依赖于不确定性。
ai.method: 将随机谓词的时间逻辑规范转化为增广空间上的确定谓词规范，并利用障碍证书提供可处理的优化条件。
ai.result: 针对线性动力学和安全规范，推导出障碍证书保证违反概率上界的解析条件，并通过数值案例验证。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户验证随机动态系统在不确定环境下的安全性能，避免动态规划的计算负担。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机谓词的不确定性视为增广状态，利用障碍证书直接界定违反概率。
idea_spark.risk: 增广空间维度可能随不确定性源增加而爆炸，需注意可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从随机谓词到确定谓词的转化思路可启发其他含随机性的形式化验证问题。

en.tldr: A barrier certificate framework is developed to bound the probability of satisfying temporal logic specifications with randomly evolving predicates on stochastic dynamical systems.
en.motivation: Existing verification methods assume deterministic predicates, but in practice predicates may evolve randomly, making satisfaction probability depend on uncertainty.
en.method: Transform temporal logic specifications with stochastic predicates into deterministic ones on an augmented space, then use barrier certificates to provide tractable optimization-based conditions.
en.result: For linear dynamics and safety specifications, analytical conditions are derived for barrier certificates to guarantee probability bounds, demonstrated on numerical case studies.
en.help_to_user: Helps users verify safety of stochastic dynamical systems under uncertain environments without the computational burden of dynamic programming.

idea_spark.idea: Treat predicate uncertainty as an augmented state and use barrier certificates to directly bound violation probability.
idea_spark.risk: The augmented space dimension may grow with the number of uncertainty sources, posing scalability challenges.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of converting stochastic predicates to deterministic ones on an augmented space may inspire other formal verification problems involving randomness.

papers.title: Semi-Supervised Neural Super-Resolution for Mesh-Based Simulations
papers.summary: Mesh-based simulations provide high-fidelity solutions to partial differential equations (PDEs), but achieving such accuracy typically requires fine meshes, leading to substantial computational overhead. Super-resolution techniques aim to mitigate this cost by reconstructing high-resolution (HR), high-fidelity solutions from low-cost, low-resolution (LR) counterparts. However, training neural networks for super-resolution often demands large amounts of expensive HR supervision data. To address this challenge, we propose SuperMeshNet, an HR data-efficient super-resolution framework for mesh-based simulations aided by message passing neural networks (MPNNs). At its core, SuperMeshNet introduces complementary learning, a semi-supervised approach that effectively leverages both 1) a small amount of paired LR-HR data and 2) abundant unpaired LR data via two jointly trained, complementary MPNN-based models. Additionally, our model is enriched by inductive biases, which are empirically shown to further improve super-resolution performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SuperMeshNet requires 90% less HR data to achieve even lower root mean square error (RMSE) than that of the fully supervised benchmark without the inductive biases. The source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/jykim-git/SuperMeshNet.git.

ai.tldr: 提出SuperMeshNet，一种基于消息传递神经网络的半监督超分辨率框架，用于网格模拟，仅需少量高分辨率数据即可达到甚至超越全监督方法的精度。
ai.motivation: 网格模拟中高精度解需要细网格，计算开销大；超分辨率技术可降低计算成本，但训练神经网络需要大量昂贵的高分辨率标注数据。
ai.method: 采用互补学习半监督策略，联合训练两个消息传递神经网络模型，同时利用少量配对低-高分辨率数据和大量未配对低分辨率数据，并引入归纳偏置提升性能。
ai.result: 相比全监督基准（无归纳偏置），SuperMeshNet减少90%高分辨率数据需求，且均方根误差更低。
ai.help_to_user: 若您从事计算流体力学或有限元模拟，本方法可帮助您用更少的高分辨率数据训练超分辨率模型，加速高保真模拟。

idea_spark.idea: 将互补学习与物理信息神经网络结合，利用未标注数据中的物理约束进一步减少标注需求。
idea_spark.risk: 归纳偏置可能不适用于所有PDE类型，需验证泛化性；半监督依赖未标注数据质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受半监督学习在图像超分辨率中成功应用的启发，将其引入网格模拟领域，并利用图神经网络处理非结构化网格。

en.tldr: Proposes SuperMeshNet, a semi-supervised super-resolution framework for mesh-based simulations using message passing neural networks, achieving high accuracy with 90% less high-resolution data than fully supervised baselines.
en.motivation: Mesh-based simulations require fine meshes for high-fidelity solutions, incurring high computational cost; super-resolution reduces cost but demands expensive high-resolution training data.
en.method: Employs complementary learning, a semi-supervised approach that jointly trains two MPNN models on a small set of paired LR-HR data and abundant unpaired LR data, enhanced by inductive biases.
en.result: SuperMeshNet achieves lower RMSE than the fully supervised benchmark without inductive biases while requiring 90% less HR data.
en.help_to_user: If you work on computational fluid dynamics or finite element simulations, this method helps train super-resolution models with fewer high-resolution labels, accelerating high-fidelity simulations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine complementary learning with physics-informed neural networks to leverage physical constraints from unlabeled data, further reducing label requirements.
idea_spark.risk: Inductive biases may not generalize across all PDE types; semi-supervised performance depends on unlabeled data quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of semi-supervised learning in image super-resolution, adapted to mesh-based simulations using graph neural networks for unstructured grids.

papers.title: From Single-Step Edit Response to Multi-Step Molecular Optimization
papers.summary: Conditional molecular optimization aims to edit a molecule to realize a specified property shift. In practice, structurally similar molecule data is scarce, while decisions are inherently action-level: at each step, the system must select one local structural edit from a candidate set that is strictly filtered by chemical feasibility rules. This level mismatch between supervision and decision makes oracle-in-the-loop search unstable in molecular optimization. Regressing on property differences between molecule pairs improves data efficiency but relies on oracle-in-the-loop search, entangling transformation effects with global context and providing limited guidance for selecting the next feasible edit, often resorting to oracle-in-the-loop search. For this reason, we propose a response-oriented discrete edit optimization approach comprising two tightly coupled components: a single-step molecular edit response predictor (SMER) and a multi-step planner that composes local predictions into optimization trajectories via guided tree search (SMER-Opt). The approach learns a directional evaluation model over edit actions to support constraint-aware planning. It mines weakly related molecule pairs and decomposes their structural differences into minimal edit units, turning endpoint property annotations into process-level supervision and yielding reusable, transferable action primitives. A directional edit evaluator then scores feasible candidate edits by their likelihood of moving the molecule toward the desired property change, substantially reducing dependence on external evaluator queries at decision time. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SMER.

ai.tldr: 提出一种响应导向的离散编辑优化方法，通过单步分子编辑响应预测器和多步规划器，将端点属性标注转化为过程级监督，减少对外部评估器的依赖。
ai.motivation: 现有条件分子优化方法面临监督与决策的层级不匹配，且依赖外部评估器进行搜索，导致不稳定且效率低。
ai.method: 设计单步分子编辑响应预测器（SMER）和基于引导树搜索的多步规划器（SMER-Opt），从弱相关分子对中挖掘最小编辑单元，训练方向性编辑评估器。
ai.result: 显著减少对外部评估器查询的依赖，实现约束感知的规划，提升优化稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需大量外部评估器调用的分子优化方法，适用于数据稀缺场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将分子对属性差异分解为最小编辑单元，将端点监督转化为过程级监督。
idea_spark.risk: 弱相关分子对的挖掘质量可能影响编辑单元的可重用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从弱监督中提取可迁移动作基元，减少对密集标注的依赖。

en.tldr: Proposes a response-oriented discrete edit optimization approach with a single-step molecular edit response predictor and a multi-step planner, converting endpoint property annotations into process-level supervision and reducing reliance on external evaluator queries.
en.motivation: Existing conditional molecular optimization suffers from a level mismatch between supervision and decision, and relies on oracle-in-the-loop search, leading to instability and inefficiency.
en.method: Designs a single-step molecular edit response predictor (SMER) and a multi-step planner with guided tree search (SMER-Opt), mining minimal edit units from weakly related molecule pairs to train a directional edit evaluator.
en.result: Substantially reduces dependence on external evaluator queries, enabling constraint-aware planning and improving optimization stability.
en.help_to_user: Provides a molecular optimization method that requires fewer external evaluator calls, suitable for data-scarce scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose property differences of molecule pairs into minimal edit units, converting endpoint supervision into process-level supervision.
idea_spark.risk: Quality of mined weakly related pairs may affect reusability of edit units.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extract transferable action primitives from weak supervision to reduce reliance on dense annotations.

papers.title: Riemannian optimal reduction for linear systems with quadratic outputs
papers.summary: This paper presents an H2-optimal model order reduction (MOR) method for linear systems with quadratic outputs based on Riemannian optimization. The H2-optimal MOR is formulated as an optimization problem in which the optimization variables are selected directly as the coefficient matrices of reduced models. The product manifold is defined properly to impose the stability condition for reduced models. By exploiting the geometric properties of the product manifold, we derive an explicit formula for Riemannian gradient of the objective function, and then a limited-memory Riemannian BFGS method is adopted to solve the resulting optimization problem iteratively. In contrast to selecting projection matrices, optimizing coefficient matrices of reduced models reduces the amount of variables dramatically. Numerical simulation results demonstrate that reduced models accurately approximate the original system and exhibit superior performance in terms of H2 error, which confirms the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于黎曼优化的H2最优模型降阶方法，用于具有二次输出的线性系统。
ai.motivation: 现有方法通常优化投影矩阵，变量多且计算复杂；直接优化降阶模型系数矩阵可大幅减少变量。
ai.method: 将H2最优降阶问题建模为黎曼流形上的优化，定义乘积流形施加稳定性约束，推导黎曼梯度显式公式，采用有限记忆黎曼BFGS迭代求解。
ai.result: 数值实验表明降阶模型能准确逼近原系统，H2误差优于对比方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、稳定的模型降阶算法，适用于具有二次输出的线性系统仿真与控制。

idea_spark.idea: 将乘积流形约束与有限记忆BFGS结合，实现稳定且变量少的降阶优化。
idea_spark.risk: 黎曼梯度的计算复杂度可能随系统规模增长，需验证大规模系统的可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用流形几何结构简化约束优化，启发其他工程中涉及矩阵流形约束的问题。

en.tldr: An H2-optimal model order reduction method for linear systems with quadratic outputs using Riemannian optimization.
en.motivation: Existing methods often optimize projection matrices with many variables; directly optimizing coefficient matrices of reduced models dramatically reduces the number of variables.
en.method: Formulate H2-optimal MOR as an optimization on a Riemannian manifold, define a product manifold to enforce stability, derive an explicit Riemannian gradient, and solve iteratively with limited-memory Riemannian BFGS.
en.result: Numerical results show reduced models accurately approximate the original system with superior H2 error performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and stable model reduction algorithm for linear systems with quadratic outputs in simulation and control.

idea_spark.idea: Combine product manifold constraints with limited-memory BFGS for stable and variable-efficient reduction optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Computational cost of Riemannian gradient may scale with system size; scalability to large systems needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging manifold geometry to simplify constrained optimization inspires similar approaches in other engineering problems with matrix manifold constraints.

papers.title: Quantile-Coupled Flow Matching for Distributional Reinforcement Learning
papers.summary: Unlike standard expected-return Reinforcement Learning (RL), Distributional RL (DRL) models the full return distribution, making it better-suited for uncertainty-aware and risk-sensitive decision-making. Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) critics have recently attracted attention for modelling continuous, multi-modal return distributions. Despite this interest, there remains a substantial metric mismatch: DRL theory relies on the distributional Bellman operator being contractive in the $p$-Wasserstein distance, yet existing CFM critics are trained with arbitrary source-target couplings, so their flow-matching losses are not Wasserstein-aligned surrogates for matching Bellman target return distributions. In this work, we address this mismatch by proposing FlowIQN, a CFM critic that sorts source and Bellman target samples within each mini-batch to approximate the monotone optimal transport coupling, replacing arbitrary pairings with quantile-aligned flow paths. We prove that the loss of our quantile-coupled CFM critic yields a Wasserstein-aligned approximate projection compatible with the foundations of DRL. To our knowledge, FlowIQN is the first flow-matching distributional critic with an explicit Wasserstein-aligned projection guarantee. We further extend FlowIQN with shortcut models for efficient inference. Empirical results show that FlowIQN improves Wasserstein return-distribution accuracy over other CFM critics. It also yields competitive performance on offline RL benchmarks across multiple policy extraction methods, providing a theoretically grounded CFM critic that is readily compatible with DRL pipelines. Code: https://github.com/ori-goals/flowIQN.

ai.tldr: 提出FlowIQN，一种通过分位数对齐耦合实现Wasserstein对齐的流匹配分布性评论家，解决了分布强化学习中流匹配损失与Wasserstein距离不匹配的问题。
ai.motivation: 现有条件流匹配评论家训练时使用任意源-目标配对，其损失函数未与Wasserstein距离对齐，而分布强化学习理论依赖Wasserstein收缩性。
ai.method: 在每小批量中对源样本和贝尔曼目标样本排序，近似单调最优传输耦合，用分位数对齐的流路径替代任意配对，并证明该损失是Wasserstein对齐的近似投影。
ai.result: FlowIQN在Wasserstein回报分布精度上优于其他CFM评论家，在离线RL基准测试中取得有竞争力的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为分布强化学习提供了一种理论扎实、Wasserstein对齐的流匹配评论家实现，可直接集成到现有DRL流程中。

idea_spark.idea: 利用排序操作近似最优传输耦合，使流匹配损失与Wasserstein距离对齐，从而提升分布性评论家的理论一致性和实际性能。
idea_spark.risk: 排序操作可能引入额外计算开销，且对离群值敏感；理论保证仅在单调耦合下成立，实际收敛性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将最优传输中的排序思想引入流匹配，为分布性强化学习提供更严格的损失函数设计。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将最优传输中的排序思想引入流匹配，为分布性强化学习提供更严格的损失函数设计。

en.tldr: Proposes FlowIQN, a flow-matching distributional critic with quantile-aligned coupling that achieves Wasserstein alignment, addressing the metric mismatch in distributional RL.
en.motivation: Existing CFM critics use arbitrary source-target pairings, making their losses not Wasserstein-aligned surrogates, while DRL theory relies on Wasserstein contractivity.
en.method: Sorts source and Bellman target samples within each mini-batch to approximate monotone optimal transport coupling, replacing arbitrary pairings with quantile-aligned flow paths, and proves the loss yields a Wasserstein-aligned approximate projection.
en.result: FlowIQN improves Wasserstein return-distribution accuracy over other CFM critics and achieves competitive performance on offline RL benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically grounded, Wasserstein-aligned flow-matching critic readily compatible with DRL pipelines.

idea_spark.idea: Use sorting to approximate optimal transport coupling, aligning flow-matching loss with Wasserstein distance for improved theoretical consistency and performance.
idea_spark.risk: Sorting may introduce computational overhead and sensitivity to outliers; theoretical guarantees hold only under monotone coupling, requiring further convergence analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introduce sorting from optimal transport into flow matching for stricter loss design in distributional RL.

papers.title: Generalized Wasserstein Flow Matching: Transport Plans, Everywhere, All at Once
papers.summary: Flow matching has recently emerged as a flexible and efficient framework for generative modelling by learning deterministic transport dynamics between probability measures. In this work, we extend flow matching to the space of probability measures over probability measures, introducing a Wasserstein-on-Wasserstein (WoW) formulation. Leveraging the nested Wasserstein geometry, we show that measures over transport plans naturally induce velocity fields that realize metameasure flows. This yields a principled generalization of Wasserstein flow matching via coupled outer and inner transport plans. To address the substantial computational cost of WoW transport, we propose scalable approximations based on sliced and linear Wasserstein distances, enabling efficient training while promoting numerically stable, near-straight trajectories. Our framework unifies and extends existing approaches to point cloud and set generation, providing a practical and theoretically grounded method for generative modelling in WoW spaces.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种广义Wasserstein流匹配框架，通过嵌套Wasserstein几何在概率测度空间上学习确定性传输动力学，并利用切片和线性Wasserstein距离实现高效训练。
ai.motivation: 现有流匹配方法局限于单一概率测度空间，无法处理测度上的测度（如点云集合）的生成问题。
ai.method: 引入Wasserstein-on-Wasserstein (WoW) 公式，通过内外传输计划耦合实现元测度流；采用切片和线性Wasserstein距离近似以降低计算成本。
ai.result: 统一并扩展了点云和集合生成方法，实现了数值稳定、近乎直线的轨迹。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种理论上严谨且实用的生成建模工具，适用于点云、集合等复杂结构数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将WoW与扩散模型结合，或利用其几何性质设计新的正则化项。
idea_spark.risk: 近似方法可能丢失精确Wasserstein几何的某些特性，影响生成质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优传输的嵌套结构出发，启发设计更高效的分布间传输算法。

papers.title: MARGIN: Margin-Aware Regularized Geometry for Imbalanced Vulnerability Detection
papers.summary: Software vulnerability detection is critical for ensuring software security and reliability. Despite recent advances in deep learning, real-world vulnerability datasets suffer from two severe challenges: frequency imbalance and difficulty imbalance. We reinterpret these challenges from an embedding geometry perspective, observing that such imbalances induce geometric distortions in hyperspherical representation space. To address this issue, we propose MARGIN, a metric-based framework that learns discriminative vulnerability representations through adaptive margin metric learning and hyperspherical prototype modeling. MARGIN dynamically adjusts geometric regularization according to the distribution structure estimated by the von Mises-Fisher concentration, aligning the probability mass of embedding distributions with their corresponding Voronoi cells, thereby reducing geometric distortion and yielding more stable decision boundaries. Extensive experiments on public vulnerability datasets show that MARGIN consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving notable improvements in classification and detection, especially on challenging, imbalanced datasets. Further analysis demonstrates that MARGIN produces more structured embedding geometries, improving robustness, interpretability, and generalization.

ai.tldr: 提出MARGIN框架，通过自适应边界度量学习和超球面原型建模，解决漏洞检测中的频率不平衡和难度不平衡问题。
ai.motivation: 真实漏洞数据存在频率和难度双重不平衡，导致嵌入空间几何畸变，影响检测性能。
ai.method: 利用von Mises-Fisher浓度估计分布结构，动态调整几何正则化，使嵌入分布概率质量与Voronoi单元对齐，减少几何畸变。
ai.result: 在公开漏洞数据集上，MARGIN显著优于强基线，尤其在困难不平衡样本上提升明显，且嵌入几何更结构化。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种处理不平衡漏洞数据的有效方法，可提升检测鲁棒性和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何正则化与浓度估计结合，动态调整决策边界，为不平衡学习提供新视角。
idea_spark.risk: 对von Mises-Fisher分布的假设可能不适用于所有数据分布，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从嵌入几何角度重新审视不平衡问题，启发设计更自适应的正则化策略。

en.tldr: Proposes MARGIN, a framework using adaptive margin metric learning and hyperspherical prototype modeling to address frequency and difficulty imbalance in vulnerability detection.
en.motivation: Real-world vulnerability data suffers from frequency and difficulty imbalances, causing geometric distortions in embedding space and degrading detection performance.
en.method: Estimates distribution structure via von Mises-Fisher concentration, dynamically adjusts geometric regularization to align embedding probability mass with Voronoi cells, reducing geometric distortion.

idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting imbalance from an embedding geometry perspective inspires the design of more adaptive regularization strategies.

papers.title: TTCD:Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery from Non-Stationary Time Series Data
papers.summary: The widespread availability of complex time series data in various domains such as environmental science, epidemiology, and economics demands robust causal discovery methods that can identify intricate contemporaneous and lagged relationships in non-stationary, nonlinear, and noisy settings. Existing constraint-based methods often rely heavily on conditional independence tests that degrade for limited data samples and complex distributions, while score-based methods impose strong statistical assumptions. Recent methods address special cases such as change point detection or distribution shifts, but struggle to provide a unified solution. We propose the Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery (TTCD) Framework, a novel end-to-end approach that learns contemporaneous and lagged causal relations from non-stationary time series. TTCD introduces a Non-Stationary Feature Learner integrating temporal and frequency-domain attention with dynamic non-stationarity profiling, and a custom Causal Structure Learner. A key innovation is reconstruction-guided causal signal distillation, to distill essential causal signals through the reconstruction process of the transformer decoder, which mitigates noise and spurious correlations while preserving meaningful dependencies. The Causal Structure Learner operates on distilled reconstructed signals to infer the underlying causal graph without restrictive assumptions on noise distributions or data generation processes. Experiments on synthetic, benchmark, and real world datasets show that TTCD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and consistency with domain knowledge, demonstrating the approach's effectiveness for causal discovery in challenging real world contexts.

ai.tldr: 提出TTCD框架，利用Transformer从非平稳时间序列中学习同期和滞后因果关系。
ai.motivation: 现有因果发现方法在处理非平稳、非线性和噪声数据时存在局限性，缺乏统一解决方案。
ai.method: 设计非平稳特征学习器（融合时域和频域注意力）和因果结构学习器，通过重建引导的因果信号蒸馏去除噪声和虚假相关。
ai.result: 在合成、基准和真实数据集上优于现有基线，准确性和领域知识一致性更高。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从复杂非平稳时间序列中提取可靠因果关系，适用于环境、流行病学、经济学等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 将频域注意力与非平稳性刻画结合，可能提升对周期性或趋势性因果的捕捉能力。
idea_spark.risk: Transformer计算开销大，长序列或高频数据可能面临效率挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用重建过程作为因果信号过滤器，启发其他领域（如视频因果发现）的类似设计。

en.motivation: Existing causal discovery methods struggle with non-stationary, nonlinear, and noisy data, lacking a unified solution.
en.method: Designs a Non-Stationary Feature Learner with temporal and frequency-domain attention, and a Causal Structure Learner; uses reconstruction-guided causal signal distillation to remove noise and spurious correlations.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on synthetic, benchmark, and real-world datasets in accuracy and domain knowledge consistency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users extract reliable causal relationships from complex non-stationary time series in fields like environmental science, epidemiology, and economics.

idea_spark.risk: Transformer computational overhead may challenge efficiency for long sequences or high-frequency data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using reconstruction as a causal signal filter inspires similar designs in other domains like video causal discovery.

papers.title: WindINR: Latent-State INR for Fast Local Wind Query and Correction in Complex Terrain
papers.summary: Many downstream decisions in complex terrain require fast wind estimates at a small number of user-specified locations and heights for a given forecast valid time, rather than another dense forecast field on a fixed grid. We present WindINR, a latent-state implicit neural representation framework for continuous high-resolution local wind query and sparse-observation correction. WindINR maps static terrain descriptors, a low-resolution background field, and continuous query coordinates to a high-resolution wind state through a latent-conditioned decoder. To enable rapid inference-time correction, WindINR separates reusable representation learning from sample-specific latent-state correction. During training, a privileged encoder infers a reference latent state from high-resolution supervision, a deployable latent predictor estimates an initial latent state from inference-time inputs alone, and their discrepancies are summarized into a dataset-adaptive Gaussian prior over latent corrections. At inference time, within the WindINR module, network weights remain fixed and only the latent state is updated by minimizing a regularized correction objective using sparse observations and their uncertainty. In controlled OSSEs over the Senja region, including a UAV-aided approach scenario and random-observation robustness tests, WindINR improves local high-resolution wind estimates by updating only a compact latent state rather than the full network. The corrected representation remains continuously queryable at arbitrary coordinates and, in our CPU benchmark, yields about a $2.6\times$ online-correction speedup over full-network fine-tuning, suggesting a practical interface between kilometer-scale background products, sparse local observations, and wind queries in complex terrain.

ai.tldr: 提出WindINR框架，利用隐式神经表示和潜在状态校正，在复杂地形中实现快速局部风场查询与稀疏观测融合。
ai.motivation: 复杂地形中下游决策需要快速获取少量用户指定位置和高度的高分辨率风估计，而非固定网格的密集预报场。
ai.method: 将静态地形描述符、低分辨率背景场和连续查询坐标映射为高分辨率风状态，通过潜在状态解码器实现；训练时利用特权编码器学习参考潜在状态，推理时仅更新潜在状态以融合稀疏观测。
ai.result: 在Senja地区的OSSE实验中，包括无人机辅助场景和随机观测鲁棒性测试，WindINR通过仅更新紧凑潜在状态而非整个网络，提升了局部高分辨率风估计，CPU基准测试中在线校正速度比全网络微调快约2.6倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速获取复杂地形中任意位置和高度的高分辨率风场估计，并利用稀疏观测进行实时校正。

idea_spark.idea: 将可复用表示学习与样本特定潜在状态校正分离，实现推理时仅更新少量参数即可适应新观测。
idea_spark.risk: 潜在状态校正可能对观测噪声敏感，且需要训练时构建合理的先验分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受隐式神经表示在连续场建模中的成功启发，结合潜在变量方法实现高效在线适应。

en.tldr: WindINR uses latent-state implicit neural representation for fast local wind query and sparse-observation correction in complex terrain.
en.motivation: Downstream decisions in complex terrain require fast wind estimates at a few user-specified locations and heights, not dense forecast grids.
en.method: Maps terrain descriptors, low-resolution background field, and query coordinates to high-resolution wind via a latent-conditioned decoder; separates representation learning from sample-specific latent correction.
en.result: In OSSEs over Senja, including UAV-aided and random-observation tests, WindINR improves local wind estimates by updating only a compact latent state, achieving ~2.6× speedup over full-network fine-tuning on CPU.

idea_spark.idea: Decouple reusable representation learning from sample-specific latent correction, allowing inference-time adaptation by updating only a compact latent state.
idea_spark.risk: Latent correction may be sensitive to observation noise and requires a well-constructed prior distribution during training.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by implicit neural representations for continuous field modeling, combined with latent variable methods for efficient online adaptation.

papers.title: Constant-Target Energy Matching: A Unified Framework for Continuous and Discrete Density Estimation
papers.summary: Density estimation is a central primitive in probabilistic modeling, yet continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable domains are often treated by separate objectives, limiting the ability to exploit a common statistical structure across data types. Continuous score-based methods rely on log-density gradients, while discrete extensions typically use concrete score whose unbounded targets become unstable near low-probability states. We introduce Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM), a unified energy-based framework for density estimation on general state spaces. CTEM replaces ordinary density-ratio regression with a bounded energy-difference transform and derives from it a sample-only training objective with the constant target 1. The learned scalar potential recovers log p without partition-function estimation or explicit unbounded ratio regression. Across continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable benchmarks, CTEM substantially improves density estimation over competitive baselines and yields higher-quality samples under standard sampling procedures.

ai.tldr: 提出常数目标能量匹配（CTEM），一个统一的基于能量的密度估计框架，适用于连续、离散和混合变量域。
ai.motivation: 现有连续和离散密度估计方法使用不同的目标函数，无法共享统计结构，且离散方法中无界目标在低概率状态附近不稳定。
ai.method: 用有界能量差变换替代密度比回归，推导出仅需样本的训练目标，其常数为1，学习到的标量势可直接恢复对数密度，无需估计配分函数或显式无界比回归。
ai.result: 在连续、离散和混合变量基准上，CTEM显著优于竞争基线，并在标准采样程序下生成更高质量的样本。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种统一的密度估计方法，简化了跨数据类型建模，并提高了估计和采样质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将能量差变换与常数目标结合，可能启发新的对比学习或自监督学习方法。
idea_spark.risk: 对于极高维或复杂结构的数据，有界能量差变换可能仍面临优化挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理中的能量视角出发，将密度估计转化为势函数学习，避免了配分函数难题。

idea_spark.risk: 对于极高维或复杂结构的数据，有界能量差变换可能仍面临优化挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理中的能量视角出发，将密度估计转化为势函数学习，避免了配分函数难题。

en.tldr: Proposes Constant-Target Energy Matching (CTEM), a unified energy-based framework for density estimation on continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable domains.
en.motivation: Existing continuous and discrete density estimation methods use separate objectives, limiting shared statistical structure, and discrete methods suffer from unbounded targets near low-probability states.
en.method: Replaces ordinary density-ratio regression with a bounded energy-difference transform and derives a sample-only training objective with constant target 1; the learned scalar potential recovers log p without partition-function estimation or explicit unbounded ratio regression.
en.result: CTEM substantially improves density estimation over competitive baselines on continuous, discrete, and mixed-variable benchmarks, and yields higher-quality samples under standard sampling procedures.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified density estimation method that simplifies modeling across data types and improves estimation and sample quality.

idea_spark.idea: Combining energy-difference transform with a constant target may inspire new contrastive learning or self-supervised methods.
idea_spark.risk: For very high-dimensional or complex data, the bounded energy-difference transform may still face optimization challenges.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from the energy perspective in physics, density estimation is cast as learning a scalar potential, circumventing the partition function problem.

papers.title: Minimax optimal submatrix detection: Sharp non-asymptotic rates
papers.summary: We consider the problem of detecting a hidden submatrix of size $s_1 \times s_2$ in a high-dimensional Gaussian matrix of size $d_1 \times d_2$. Under the null hypothesis, the observed matrix has i.i.d.\ entries with distribution $N(0,1)$. Under the alternative hypothesis, there exists an unknown submatrix of size $s_1 \times s_2$ with i.i.d.\ entries with distribution $N(μ, 1)$ for some $μ>0$, while all other entries outside the submatrix are i.i.d.\ $N(0,1)$. Specifically, we provide non-asymptotic upper and lower bounds on the smallest signal strength $μ^*$ that is both necessary and sufficient to ensure the existence of a test with small enough Type I and Type II errors. We also derive novel minimax-optimal tests achieving these fundamental limits, and describe extensions of these tests that are adaptive to unknown sparsity levels $s_1$ and $s_2$. Our proposed detection procedure is a careful combination of novel test statistics which may be of independent interest. In contrast with previous work, which required restrictive assumptions on $d_1, d_2, s_1$ and $s_2$, our non-asymptotic upper and lower bounds match for any configuration of these parameters.

ai.tldr: 在高斯矩阵中检测隐藏子矩阵，给出了最小信号强度的非渐近上下界，并提出了达到这些界的最优检验。
ai.motivation: 现有子矩阵检测工作对矩阵维度有严格假设，缺乏非渐近的精确刻画。
ai.method: 组合新颖检验统计量，推导非渐近上下界，并构造自适应于未知稀疏度的检验。

en.tldr: Detects a hidden submatrix in a Gaussian matrix, provides non-asymptotic upper and lower bounds on the minimal signal strength, and constructs minimax-optimal tests.

idea_spark.inspiration: The adaptive sparsity approach inspires designing anomaly detection algorithms without prior knowledge.

papers.title: Diagnostic Certificates of Data Quality and Regression Identifiability for Koopman Identification
papers.summary: Classical persistent excitation criteria usually assess whether an input or regressor signal is sufficiently rich. In Koopman and EDMD with control (EDMDc), however, data quality is determined by the concatenation of lifted state features and control inputs. Input-rich data can still visit a narrow state region, well-spread state samples can still produce degenerate lifted features, and both can fail to condition the final regression problem.   This paper develops a diagnostic certificate framework for locating these failures. The certificates separate state-space coverage and clustering, lifted-feature nondegeneracy, and the final regression spectrum. The regression-spectrum certificate is the layer with direct theoretical guarantees: it controls the active standardized design's smallest singular value, has Fisher-information and one-step EDMDc stability interpretations, and admits a finite-sample lower bound under a population spectral gap. We also give structural examples and a Schur-complement condition showing why state, lifted, input, and regression diagnostics cannot be substituted for one another.   As a sampling example, IGPE-DOPT uses these certificates to score candidate trajectory segments. Experiments on Duffing, Van der Pol, and Lorenz systems compare input-, state-, lifted-, and regression-oriented baselines. The results show that certificate layers separate, budget and weights shift bottlenecks, and downstream prediction or control performance is not monotone in any single certificate. The framework is therefore intended as an interpretable diagnostic and data-collection guide, not as a universal optimality claim.

ai.tldr: 本文针对Koopman辨识中的EDMDc方法，提出了一套诊断证书框架，用于定位数据质量与回归可辨识性失败的原因，并通过实验验证了各诊断层的独立性与实用性。
ai.motivation: 经典持续激励准则仅评估输入信号是否充分，但在Koopman辨识中，数据质量由升维状态特征与控制输入的拼接决定，现有方法无法有效诊断状态覆盖不足、特征退化或回归病态等问题。
ai.method: 开发了分离状态空间覆盖、升维特征非退化与回归谱的诊断证书，其中回归谱证书通过控制最小奇异值、Fisher信息及有限样本下界提供理论保证，并引入Schur补条件说明各诊断层不可替代。
ai.result: 在Duffing、Van der Pol和Lorenz系统上的实验表明，证书层能分离瓶颈，预算与权重会转移瓶颈，下游预测或控制性能不随单一证书单调变化。
ai.help_to_user: 该框架可作为可解释的诊断工具与数据采集指南，帮助用户识别数据收集中的薄弱环节，优化实验设计。

idea_spark.idea: 结合回归谱证书与主动学习策略，动态选择最有益于改善最小奇异值的轨迹片段进行数据采集。
idea_spark.risk: 证书的计算可能增加在线数据采集的延迟，且理论保证依赖于谱间隙假设，实际系统中可能不严格满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Fisher信息与回归稳定性联系的启发，可将类似诊断框架应用于模型预测控制中的数据质量评估。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a diagnostic certificate framework for Koopman identification via EDMDc, isolating failures in data quality and regression identifiability, and validates its utility on several nonlinear systems.
en.motivation: Classical persistent excitation criteria only assess input richness, but in Koopman identification, data quality depends on the concatenation of lifted state features and control inputs, and existing methods cannot diagnose issues like poor state coverage, feature degeneracy, or ill-conditioned regression.
en.method: Develops certificates that separate state-space coverage, lifted-feature nondegeneracy, and the regression spectrum. The regression-spectrum certificate provides theoretical guarantees via smallest singular value control, Fisher information, and a finite-sample lower bound under a spectral gap, with a Schur-complement condition showing the non-substitutability of diagnostic layers.
en.result: Experiments on Duffing, Van der Pol, and Lorenz systems show that certificate layers isolate bottlenecks, budget and weights shift bottlenecks, and downstream prediction or control performance is not monotonic in any single certificate.
en.help_to_user: The framework serves as an interpretable diagnostic and data-collection guide, helping users identify weak links in data acquisition and optimize experimental design.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the regression-spectrum certificate with active learning to dynamically select trajectory segments that most improve the smallest singular value for data collection.
idea_spark.risk: Computing certificates may introduce latency in online data collection, and theoretical guarantees rely on a spectral gap assumption that may not hold strictly in real systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the connection between Fisher information and regression stability, a similar diagnostic framework could be applied to assess data quality in model predictive control.

papers.title: Score-Based Generative Modeling through Anisotropic Stochastic Partial Differential Equations
papers.summary: Score-based generative modeling (SBGM) has achieved state-of-the-art performance in image generation, with the quality of generated images being highly dependent on the design of the forward (diffusion) process. Among these, models based on stochastic differential equations (SDEs) have proven particularly effective. While traditional methods aim to progressively destroy all image information to enable reconstruction from pure noise, we propose a class of anisotropic stochastic partial differential equations (SPDEs) that preserve the geometric structure of the data over longer time scales throughout the transformation. These SPDEs consist of a drift term that enforces deterministic destruction via structured smoothing, and a diffusion coefficient that enables random destruction through noise injection. Both components are governed by anisotropy coefficients, enabling controlled, direction-dependent information degradation. This framework provides the theoretical foundation for a novel anisotropic score-based generative model. By retaining geometric structure for longer time scales, the backward generative process can exploit residual geometric cues, leading to improved reconstruction fidelity. We empirically validate this improvement in a proof-of-concept implementation on unconditional image generation, showing that anisotropic diffusion can achieve superior image quality metrics. We demonstrate consistent improvements in both pixel and latent space experiments over the SDE-driven baseline as well as over the state-of-the-art Flow Matching approach. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the introduced anisotropy in a conditional stroke-to-image generation task.

ai.tldr: 提出一类各向异性随机偏微分方程，在扩散过程中保留数据几何结构，从而提升生成图像质量。
ai.motivation: 传统SDE扩散模型会逐步破坏所有图像信息，导致生成时缺乏几何线索。
ai.method: 设计各向异性SPDE，漂移项实现结构化平滑，扩散系数控制方向依赖的噪声注入。
ai.result: 在无条件图像生成中，像素空间和潜空间指标均优于SDE基线和Flow Matching方法；条件笔画到图像任务也验证了有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种保留几何结构的扩散框架，可用于改进生成模型的保真度。

idea_spark.idea: 将各向异性SPDE与条件控制结合，实现更精细的几何引导生成。
idea_spark.risk: 各向异性系数的设计可能依赖先验知识，泛化性需进一步验证。

en.tldr: Proposes a class of anisotropic SPDEs that preserve data geometric structure during diffusion, improving generated image quality.
en.motivation: Traditional SDE diffusion models progressively destroy all image information, losing geometric cues for generation.
en.method: Designs anisotropic SPDEs with a drift term for structured smoothing and a diffusion coefficient for direction-dependent noise injection.
en.result: Outperforms SDE baseline and Flow Matching in both pixel and latent space unconditional image generation; validated on conditional stroke-to-image task.
en.help_to_user: Provides a geometric-structure-preserving diffusion framework to enhance generative model fidelity.

idea_spark.idea: Combine anisotropic SPDEs with conditional control for finer geometry-guided generation.
idea_spark.risk: Design of anisotropy coefficients may rely on prior knowledge; generalization needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by preserving geometric structure during diffusion, explore other structural priors (e.g., topology, symmetry) in generative models.

papers.title: Newton Method for Soft Quadratic Surface Support Vector Machine with 0-1 Loss Function
papers.summary: A nonlinear kernel-free soft quadratic surface support vector machine model with 0-1 loss function ($L_{0/1}$-SQSSVM) is proposed for binary classification problems, which is non-convex discontinuous. We are devoted to establishing the first and the second-order optimality conditions for the $L_{0/1}$-SQSSVM. We establish a stationary equation using the properties of proximal operator of 0-1 loss function. We design a Newton method based on the stationary equation to solve $L_{0/1}$-SQSSVM model and prove that the Newton method has local quadratic convergence under the second-order sufficient condition. Numerical experience on artificial datasets and benchmark datasets demonstrate that the Newton method for $L_{0/1}$-SQSSVM achieves higher classification accuracy with less CPU time cost than other state-of-the-art methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种带0-1损失函数的无核软二次曲面支持向量机模型，并设计了具有局部二次收敛性的牛顿法求解。
ai.motivation: 现有支持向量机模型多采用凸损失函数，而0-1损失函数更贴近分类目标但非凸不连续，缺乏有效的求解算法。
ai.method: 利用0-1损失函数的近端算子性质建立平稳方程，基于该方程设计牛顿法，并证明在二阶充分条件下具有局部二次收敛性。
ai.result: 在人工和基准数据集上，该方法比现有先进方法分类精度更高且CPU时间更少。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效求解非凸不连续0-1损失支持向量机模型的牛顿法，适用于二分类问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用近端算子将非光滑损失函数转化为可微形式，再设计二阶优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 二阶充分条件在实际中可能难以验证，算法收敛性对初始点敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从非凸优化中近端算子的角度出发，为离散损失函数设计连续化求解路径。

en.tldr: Proposes a kernel-free soft quadratic surface SVM with 0-1 loss and a Newton method with local quadratic convergence.
en.motivation: Existing SVMs mostly use convex losses, while the 0-1 loss better matches classification goals but is non-convex and discontinuous, lacking efficient solvers.
en.method: Establishes a stationary equation via the proximal operator of the 0-1 loss, designs a Newton method, and proves local quadratic convergence under second-order sufficient conditions.
en.result: On artificial and benchmark datasets, the method achieves higher accuracy and less CPU time than state-of-the-art methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient Newton solver for non-convex discontinuous 0-1 loss SVM, suitable for binary classification.

idea_spark.idea: Use proximal operator to smooth non-smooth loss functions, then design second-order optimization algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Second-order sufficient conditions may be hard to verify in practice; convergence is sensitive to initialization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging proximal operators in non-convex optimization to create continuous solution paths for discrete loss functions.

papers.title: Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization
papers.summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely used framework for optimizing expensive black-box functions, commonly based on Gaussian process (GP) surrogate models. Its effectiveness relies on uncertainty quantification that is both sharp (informative) and well-calibrated along the BO trajectory. In practice, GP kernel hyperparameters are unknown and are refit online from sequentially collected (non-i.i.d.) data, which can yield miscalibrated or overly conservative uncertainty and lies outside the fixed-kernel assumptions of standard BO regret theory. We propose Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization (OSCBO), a BO algorithm that adaptively balances GP sharpness and calibration by casting hyperparameter selection as a constrained online-learning problem. We also show that OSCBO preserves sublinear regret bounds by leveraging the theoretical guarantees of the underlying online learning algorithm. Empirically, OSCBO performs competitively across synthetic and real-world benchmarks, ranking among the strongest methods in final simple regret while maintaining robust cumulative-regret behavior.

ai.tldr: 提出在线锐度校准贝叶斯优化（OSCBO），通过在线学习自适应平衡高斯过程的锐度和校准，确保亚线性遗憾界。

ai.method: 将超参数选择建模为约束在线学习问题，动态调整高斯过程的锐度和校准。
ai.result: 在合成和真实基准上表现优异，最终简单遗憾排名靠前，累积遗憾行为稳健。

en.tldr: Proposes Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization (OSCBO), which adaptively balances GP sharpness and calibration via constrained online learning, preserving sublinear regret bounds.
en.motivation: Standard BO assumes fixed kernel hyperparameters, but online refitting in practice leads to miscalibrated or overly conservative uncertainty, harming optimization efficiency.
en.method: Formulates hyperparameter selection as a constrained online learning problem to dynamically adjust GP sharpness and calibration.
en.result: Performs competitively on synthetic and real-world benchmarks, ranking among the best in final simple regret while maintaining robust cumulative regret.
en.help_to_user: Helps users optimize expensive black-box functions more efficiently, especially in online hyperparameter tuning scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Introduces calibration constraints into online learning, providing theoretical guarantees for Bayesian optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of online learning algorithm may affect practical performance, requiring careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the intersection of online convex optimization and Bayesian optimization, using regret analysis to guide algorithm design.

papers.title: Observer Design for a Class of ODE -- Continuum-PDE Cascade Systems Inspired by a Control-Theoretic Model of Large-Scale Arterial Networks of Blood Flow
papers.summary: We develop a backstepping-based observer design for a class of ODE - continuum-PDE cascade systems, which can be viewed as the limit, of a finite collection of ODE - $2 \times 2$ hyperbolic systems, as the number of individual PDE system components tends to infinity. The large-scale collection of ODE - $2 \times 2$ hyperbolic systems is motivated by a dynamic model that we present, of a network of peripheral arteries, to which central (aortic) blood flow/pressure enters. We address a case in which average (boundary) measurements, over the ensemble dimension, are available, which is motivated by the availability of non-invasive, peripheral flow/pressure measurements. Exponential stability of the estimation error system is shown by proving well-posedness of the kernel equations and constructing a Lyapunov functional. We also establish that part of the backstepping kernels derived coincide with the solution of a Sylvester equation. We then apply the continuum-based observer for state estimation of the large-scale counterpart and, in particular, of the blood flow system, introducing an approach for optimal construction of continuum approximations. We also introduce an implementation method, adopting a spectral-based approach for computing the observer dynamics, which we illustrate in an academic, numerical simulation example. Furthermore, we illustrate the design in the problem of central flow/pressure estimation using realistic parameters and flow/pressure waveforms.

ai.tldr: 针对一类ODE-连续PDE级联系统（可视为大量ODE-2×2双曲系统的极限），基于反步法设计了观测器，并应用于外周动脉网络中的血流状态估计。
ai.motivation: 外周动脉网络的大规模动态模型可表示为ODE-2×2双曲系统的集合，其连续极限为ODE-连续PDE级联系统；非侵入式外周血流/压力测量提供了平均边界观测，需要设计有效的状态观测器。
ai.method: 采用反步法设计观测器，通过证明核方程适定性和构造Lyapunov泛函确保误差系统指数稳定；部分反步核与Sylvester方程的解对应；引入连续近似的最优构造方法和基于谱方法的观测器实现。
ai.result: 证明了估计误差系统的指数稳定性；在学术数值算例和真实参数/波形下验证了中心血流/压力估计的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种处理大规模级联系统状态估计的理论框架和数值实现方法，尤其适用于血管网络等分布式参数系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用连续极限近似大规模离散系统，可降低计算复杂度；Sylvester方程与反步核的关联可能简化核求解。
idea_spark.risk: 连续近似在大规模但有限系统中可能引入误差；谱方法实现需保证数值稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将生物流体网络建模为连续介质，结合反步法观测器，可启发其他生物系统（如呼吸系统、淋巴系统）的分布式状态估计。

en.tldr: A backstepping-based observer is designed for a class of ODE-continuum-PDE cascade systems, which arise as the limit of a large collection of ODE-2×2 hyperbolic systems, with application to state estimation in peripheral arterial networks.
en.motivation: Large-scale peripheral arterial networks can be modeled as a collection of ODE-2×2 hyperbolic systems, whose continuum limit is an ODE-continuum-PDE cascade; non-invasive peripheral flow/pressure measurements provide averaged boundary observations, motivating observer design.
en.method: Backstepping observer design with well-posedness of kernel equations and Lyapunov-based exponential stability; part of the backstepping kernels coincide with the solution of a Sylvester equation; optimal construction of continuum approximations and spectral implementation.
en.result: Exponential stability of the estimation error system is proven; numerical examples with academic and realistic parameters/ waveforms demonstrate effective central flow/pressure estimation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and numerical implementation for state estimation in large-scale cascade systems, particularly applicable to distributed parameter systems like vascular networks.

idea_spark.idea: Using continuum approximation to reduce computational complexity of large discrete systems; connection between Sylvester equation and backstepping kernels may simplify kernel computation.
idea_spark.risk: Continuum approximation may introduce errors for finite but large systems; spectral implementation requires numerical stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Modeling biological fluid networks as continua combined with backstepping observers may inspire distributed state estimation in other biological systems (e.g., respiratory, lymphatic).

papers.title: Fair and Efficient Scheduling for Sensor Networks via Online Whittle Index Policy
papers.summary: Wake-Up Radio (WUR) enables resource-constrained, battery-powered sensor nodes to remain in a low-power deep sleep state while continuously listening for a Wake-Up Signal (WUS). Sensor nodes only wake and transmit data after receiving the WUS, significantly reducing energy consumption. However, polling nodes whose transmitted data provides little or no meaningful update to the remote monitor can still result in unnecessary energy usage and increased storage overhead. To address this issue, this paper uses the Age of Incorrect Information (AoII) metric to prioritise the polling of nodes that provide informative updates to the remote monitor. Determining the optimal set of nodes to poll based on AoII can be formulated as a Restless Multi-Armed Bandit (RMAB) problem, which traditionally requires prior knowledge of the monitored process transition dynamics. Since such dynamics are often unknown in practical deployments, we propose an online learning framework based on state estimation to derive Whittle Index AoII (WAoII) and Fair Whittle Index AoII (FWAoII) policies without assuming known transition probabilities. The proposed policies efficiently schedule node polling while adapting to unknown process behaviour. Experimental evaluation using both real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrates that the proposed online WAoII policy can reduce packet transmissions by up to 70\% compared to the widely used Round Robin (RR) polling strategy, while maintaining Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) values within acceptable application error tolerances. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of WAoII and FWAoII as energy-efficient polling techniques for low-power WUR sensor networks.

ai.tldr: 提出基于在线Whittle索引的公平高效传感器网络轮询调度策略，利用错误信息年龄度量减少不必要的数据传输。
ai.motivation: 唤醒无线电传感器网络中，轮询传输无意义数据的节点浪费能量和存储，需要一种能自适应未知过程动态的调度方法。
ai.method: 将轮询问题建模为RMAB，提出基于状态估计的在线学习框架，推导WAoII和FWAoII策略，无需已知转移概率。
ai.result: 在真实和合成数据集上，WAoII相比轮询策略减少高达70%的数据包传输，同时RMSE保持在可接受误差内。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲信息质量的前提下大幅降低低功耗传感器网络的能耗。

idea_spark.idea: 结合AoII与公平性约束，设计自适应调度策略，在未知动态环境中平衡信息新鲜度与能耗。
idea_spark.risk: 在线学习可能初期收敛慢，需保证在快速变化环境中的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受RMAB和Whittle索引在通信网络中的成功应用启发，将其扩展到传感器轮询场景。

idea_spark.risk: 在线学习可能初期收敛慢，需保证在快速变化环境中的稳定性。

en.tldr: Proposes an online Whittle index policy for fair and efficient sensor network polling, using Age of Incorrect Information to reduce unnecessary transmissions.
en.motivation: In Wake-Up Radio sensor networks, polling nodes that transmit uninformative data wastes energy and storage, requiring a scheduling method that adapts to unknown process dynamics.
en.method: Formulates polling as an RMAB problem and develops an online learning framework with state estimation to derive WAoII and FWAoII policies without known transition probabilities.
en.result: On real-world and synthetic datasets, WAoII reduces packet transmissions by up to 70% compared to Round Robin, while maintaining RMSE within acceptable error tolerances.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to significantly reduce energy consumption in low-power sensor networks without compromising information quality.

idea_spark.idea: Combine AoII with fairness constraints to design an adaptive scheduling policy that balances information freshness and energy consumption in unknown dynamic environments.
idea_spark.risk: Online learning may converge slowly initially, requiring guarantees of stability in rapidly changing environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the successful application of RMAB and Whittle index in communication networks, extended to sensor polling scenarios.

papers.title: PRISM: Fast Online LLM Serving via Scheduling-Memory Co-design
papers.summary: Modern online large language model (LLM) services, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and agent systems, increasingly expose two prominent characteristics: prompt segmentation (e.g., system instructions, retrieved passages, tool outputs) and hotspot skew, where a small set of these segments recurs frequently across user requests. Failing to jointly exploit these patterns could lead to repeated prefill of hot segments and prolonged TTFT, undermining both throughput and user-perceived responsiveness. However, existing work tackles these patterns independently: KV-cache management mainly exploits segment reuse while scheduling reorders requests to improve cache locality, yet neither aligns request admission with KV-cache retention. To address this gap, we first analyze how scheduling and KV-cache management jointly affect TTFT. Guided by this, we present PRISM (Prefix Reuse Optimization Integrated Scheduling and Memory), which co-designs a query-aware scheduler (QAS) with a demand-aware radix tree (DART) to align request admission with exact-prefix KV retention. Our evaluation results show that, versus the strongest baseline, PRISM reduces average per-QPS P99 TTFT by 23.3\% and 37.1\% while increasing exact-prefix KV-cache hit rate by 5.9 and 12.2 percentage points on 4B and 13B models, respectively.

ai.tldr: 提出PRISM系统，通过调度与内存协同设计，利用提示分段和热点倾斜模式，减少在线LLM服务的TTFT。
ai.motivation: 现有工作独立处理KV缓存管理和请求调度，未能联合利用提示分段和热点倾斜模式，导致重复预填充和TTFT增加。
ai.method: 设计查询感知调度器（QAS）和需求感知基数树（DART），将请求准入与精确前缀KV保留对齐。
ai.result: 相比最强基线，在4B和13B模型上，平均每QPS的P99 TTFT分别降低23.3%和37.1%，精确前缀KV缓存命中率分别提高5.9和12.2个百分点。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过调度与内存协同设计优化在线LLM服务的响应延迟。

idea_spark.idea: 将请求准入策略与缓存保留策略对齐，可进一步探索基于预测的预取或动态缓存分区。
idea_spark.risk: 热点模式可能随时间变化，需要自适应机制；精确前缀匹配可能限制缓存利用率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从操作系统虚拟内存管理中的页面置换算法获得启发，将请求视为内存访问序列。

zh.motivation: 现有工作独立处理KV缓存管理和请求调度，未能联合利用提示分段和热点倾斜模式，导致重复预填充和TTFT增加。
